creator: riggs@rrr.de
text:
Well, large pieces of code of unknown origin are certainly something
that we should not accept without asking. If it's a totally trivial
and obvious one-liner that may be different. Of course the best option
in my opinion would be to check whether pulseaudio works in a recent
svn snapshot of mplayer's source tree and then backport the patch that
enables pulseaudio to work. Maybe that's even where your patch
originally came from or it's now part of the official mplayer source.
Would you be willing to check this?

TIA
Riggs
